calendar.matters:
Petition To Accept Resignation Of Co Trustee And Appoint Successor Co Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-03-2012 Off Calendar

Petition To Accept Resignation Of Co Trustee And Appoint Successor Co Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-19-2012 Continued To Dec-03-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bette Epstein for Wells Fargo Bank (Trustee). Caroline Hinshaw for Jane Recny (Surviving Spouse/Beneficiary).

Ms. Hinshaw stated that she believes they have negotiated a settlement and that they are waiting to receive the signed document from Tom Recny. The Petition to Accept Resignation of Co-Trustee and Appoint Successor Co-Trustee was continued to December 3, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that the matter will be resolved and taken off calendar on that date.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition To Accept Resignation Of Co Trustee And Appoint Successor Co Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-19-2012 Continued To Nov-19-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
